Title: Relates to the siting of new electric transmission facilities
Summary: Provides that in the siting of new electric transmission facilities, priority shall be given to major electric transmission facilities that are proposed to be sited in existing rights-of-way including those owned by an electric corporation or distribution utility, or by the state, including any subdivision thereof, or a state public authority, for state highway or transportation purposes, and railroad corridors.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to the siting of new electric transmission facilities
